name: AI Agency NPS Survey Analyzer & Feedback Intelligence Tool
description: Zero-dependency Python CLI tool for analyzing NPS survey data, generating client feedback intelligence, and producing actionable retention improvement plans.
features: NPS score calculation with category breakdown (Promoters/Passives/Detractors)
Monthly trend tracking with direction analysis
Targeted action plan generation per segment
Self-contained HTML report generation with inline CSS
CSV import from any survey tool
